stem: A library system needs the user to enter their age before issuing a card. Acceptable values are whole numbers from 5 to 110 inclusive.
review_notes: Teacher-marked. Accept OCR pseudocode or Python. Look for: type/format validation (isdigit / try-int), range validation, loop until valid, accept message. The order of the two validations is flexible.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Write a program that asks the user for their age and only accepts whole numbers from 5 to 110 inclusive. Print 'Age accepted: <age>' once a valid value is entered. Otherwise, ask again.

mark_points.text: checks the input is a whole number (isdigit / try-int / equivalent)
checks the value is between 5 and 110 inclusive (both bounds)
loop repeats until a valid value has been entered, and prints the acceptance message at the end
